from source import bucketsort


def test_bucketsort_iterates_counts_not_arr():
    result = bucketsort([3, 1, 2, 1], 4)
    assert result == [1, 1, 2, 3], (
        f"Expected [1, 1, 2, 3] but got {result}; "
        "inner loop must enumerate(counts), not enumerate(arr)"
    )
